The '''Shiro-trap''', native to [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], was not a separate creature, but a symbiotic pairing of a [[Tooke-trap plant/Legends|Tooke trap]] plant and a [[Shiro/Legends|Shiro]]. The plant disguised the animal, while the Shiro provided the plant a form of locomotion. They were known for their appetite for [[Tooke/Legends|Tooke]].

{{Creature-stub}}
